host: Hajdus-MacBook-Pro (arm64, CPU) — run locally, away from kato15
note: Non-additive (product) cross-clique term prod_k = rk0*rk1, weight beta. MF-WIDE (multifrontal on width-4 clique tree hosting the product) == DENSE-WIDE EXACTLY at every (beta,seed), holds ~0.998 flat. NARROW (linear-only, product omitted) COLLAPSES as beta grows: 0.999 -> 0.926 -> 0.748 -> 0.376 -> 0.060. REPRESENTABILITY limit (beta omitted regardless of data), distinct from the E6/E7 estimation gap. Required treewidth = target interaction order; SBSH width certificate is the check. MF storage 14% of dense (width 4). Medians of 5 seeds.
